textByHash.180d26a39b4c9416c097ffd67dccb3609a4d8480: Very well, you may be assigned Targets up to 5 levels stronger than you. This range only applies to Targets, as Rogue fights will always have a range of 5 from your combat level.
textByHash.1c01656250cd44f18a1fa953847088d46832f0a4: If you find any, please bring them to me. I am happy to offer rewards for such items.
textByHash.2ad54c66b770340aac63eb64f5c0970258ba442d: This is Daimon's Crater. Once, it was home to a group of demons who set up a fortress inside this dormant volcano to mine rare minerals. However, their activity reactivated the volcano, resulting in their demise.
textByHash.39a438732a28926eb3b06701c9cff53df7e00473: I don't think the guards would like me to do that in this world.
textByHash.4ad2046e524e4b38220f4b02526ef8e1e052462f: Do you want to add or remove coins from your coffer?
textByHash.506fcf6916747cc290592597b657e28c760ea66f: Locate your Targets and engage them in combat, defeating them to claim your reward.
textByHash.552c48f72f6a73c188d5f9ad9006c4ea682a64df: Today, the crater is home to Bounty Hunter, a magnificent battle arena where you can engage in combat and test your mettle against skilled opponents.
textByHash.5d3061a7bdada8db8de86cf2dea91d725d2d8330: Let me know if you change your mind. My master is always looking to add to his collection.
textByHash.898910c2df83cfd4cfb07c972067887149215953: Don't suppose you've come across any strange emblems or artefacts along your journey? Ancient artefacts?
textByHash.8c0959bd1b304da18bb39fc36a981c21a9cb58ac: I used to deal in certain... emblems, for my master in the north. But now he has entrusted me with a new responsibility as the keeper of Bounty Hunter.
textByHash.902ec96125e47246e6ddaddee50bde06a10ee109: If you require further information about the Bounty Hunter, feel free to ask the Corrupted Warrior. They will be able to answer any questions you may have.
textByHash.a35948cec52d064b460fff7ce86b5e9ca9f98773: Sorry, I can't extend your PK skull beyond its existing duration.
textByHash.a4f943ce89ac424222caadf9df902bbd0bfa6e6b: You may be assigned Targets up to levels stronger than you.
textByHash.b885a5e50bc4a691354cfa0274572aae6ce0929f: Hello, wanderer. How may I help you?
textByHash.b93e46c2faad680515305752be0ee10570c75575: My master is pleased by your interest in emblem-hunting, so I'll mark that task off on your diary.
textByHash.bec913d9e32c073c74ffdf7b5ddc4e9a99c2bef6: Years later, humans settled in the ruins. Convinced that they were the descendants of the demons, they began to hunt each other for fun.
textByHash.cf4c73a36c643b6b0e7af0242701f708664f865c: Thank you. My master in the north will be very pleased.
textByHash.d26d344a599ffd2fb97e75fa3290718819af0aec: What can I do for you, wanderer?
textByHash.d93fbebdce96452d931d9674b755b6f22901be21: I don't carry rewards out here, it is far too dangerous.
textByHash.dc10bf15b8b30b95fe535a0410164177725a61e4: I seek certain... archaic emblems, and I believe you have some, either on your person or in your bank. I'll happily take yours off your hands for a handsome fee.
textByHash.dcf75ff9509b1fd2d315982fb24cdeaa7881d5f1: Before entering the arena, ensure that you have enough coins in your Coffer to participate. Upon entering, you will be assigned a Target to fight.
textByHash.e43dec497c2b032733f9b37e809bf1ba70d7a4ef: Meet me in Daimon's Crater if you would like to buy rewards.
textByHash.eca4c53909ae3e540944ef1ce66e438f1a5da60e: Very well, you may be assigned Targets up to 15 levels stronger than you. This range only applies to Targets, as Rogue fights will always have a range of 5 from your combat level.
textByHash.ee800963d841c01561aba80ce6beb3ce4b3bd96b: Don't suppose you've come across any strange emblems or artefacts along your journey? Ancient artefacts, or archaic emblems - I trade in either sort.
textByHash.fad76367e0c47cfa27d7b1619da607c552ad210c: Very well, you may be assigned Targets up to 10 levels stronger than you. This range only applies to Targets, as Rogue fights will always have a range of 5 from your combat level.
textByHash.fc27141d613664dc4f8ed72347562e69aead5deb: The different colours represent risk values. Bronze is up to 200,000. Iron is up to 800,000. Green is up to 2,000,000. Blue is up to 8,000,000. Red is any amount greater than 8,000,000.
